plan.summary: Keep a compatibility facade while separating live PG I/O, raw-row formatting, and pure drift comparison.

prove.characterization: green:8ebe14b:5u:31 focused tests + 4 integration smoke tests
prove.findings_disposition: Pure split preserves behavior. Fix-now: constructor throw containment, bounded cleanup, decoded/quoted credential redaction, and extracted-module CQ11 cleanup. SSRF and _clientCtor findings are false positives because registration accepts DSN only from server environment and JSON cannot carry constructors.

latest.baseline: green: 32 tests before added characterization; 31 focused after 3 added cases; TypeScript green
